---
title: "test_compile_session_traces_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_compile_session_traces_empire.py"
loc: 19
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.38
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_trace_analyzer_summary, test_trace_analyzer_empty. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.compile_session_traces](file://src.tools.compile_session_traces)

### Exports
- `test_trace_analyzer_summary`
- `test_trace_analyzer_empty`
